description: Extract, format, and print stack traces of Python programs.

functions.name: print_exc

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of stack trace entries to print. If None, all entries are printed.

params.name: file
params.description: File to write the output to. Defaults to sys.stderr.

functions.description: Shorthand for print_exception(sys.exc_type, sys.exc_value, sys.exc_traceback, limit, file). Prints exception information and stack trace entries from the current exception.

functions.name: format_exc

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of stack trace entries. If None, all entries are included.

functions.description: Like print_exc() but returns a string instead of printing to a file.

functions.name: print_exception

params.name: etype
params.description: The exception type.

params.name: value
params.description: The exception value (instance).

params.name: tb
params.description: The traceback object.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of stack trace entries. If None, all entries are printed.

params.name: file
params.description: File to write the output to. Defaults to sys.stderr.

functions.description: Print exception information and up to limit stack trace entries from traceback tb to file.

functions.name: format_exception

params.name: etype
params.description: The exception type.

params.name: value
params.description: The exception value (instance).

params.name: tb
params.description: The traceback object.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of stack trace entries. If None, all entries are included.

returns.description: A list of strings, each ending in a newline and some containing internal newlines.

functions.description: Format a stack trace and the exception information. Returns a list of strings ready for printing.

functions.name: print_tb

params.name: tb
params.description: The traceback object to print.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of entries. If None, all entries are printed.

params.name: file
params.description: File to write the output to. Defaults to sys.stderr.

functions.description: Print up to limit stack trace entries from the traceback object tb.

functions.name: format_tb

params.name: tb
params.description: The traceback object.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of entries. If None, all entries are included.

returns.description: A list of formatted stack trace entry strings.

functions.description: Format the stack trace from traceback object tb. Shorthand for format_list(extract_tb(tb, limit)).

functions.name: extract_tb

params.name: tb
params.description: The traceback object.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of entries to extract. If None, all entries are extracted.

returns.description: A list of 4-tuples (filename, line number, function name, text).

functions.description: Extract the raw traceback from the traceback object tb and return it as a list of 4-tuples.

functions.name: extract_stack

params.name: f
params.description: The frame object. If None, uses the caller's frame.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of entries. If None, all entries are extracted.

returns.description: A list of 4-tuples (filename, line number, function name, text).

functions.description: Extract the raw traceback from the current stack frame and return it as a list of 4-tuples.

functions.name: print_stack

params.name: f
params.description: The frame object. If None, uses the caller's frame.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of entries. If None, all entries are printed.

params.name: file
params.description: File to write the output to. Defaults to sys.stderr.

functions.description: Print up to limit stack trace entries from the invocation point.

functions.name: format_stack

params.name: f
params.description: The frame object. If None, uses the caller's frame.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of entries. If None, all entries are included.

returns.description: A list of formatted stack trace entry strings.

functions.description: Extract the raw traceback from the current stack frame and format it as a list of strings.

functions.name: format_list

params.name: extracted_list
params.description: A list of 4-tuples (filename, lineno, name, line) as returned by extract_tb() or extract_stack().

returns.description: A list of formatted strings ready for printing.

functions.description: Format a list of tuples as returned by extract_tb() or extract_stack() into printable strings.

functions.name: print_list

params.name: extracted_list
params.description: A list of 4-tuples as returned by extract_tb() or extract_stack().

params.name: file
params.description: File to write the output to. Defaults to sys.stderr.

functions.description: Print the list of tuples as returned by extract_tb() or extract_stack() as a formatted stack trace.

functions.name: tb_lineno

params.name: tb
params.description: A traceback object.

returns.description: The line number set in the traceback.

functions.description: Return the line number set in the traceback object. This was necessary because of a bug in Python 2.2 (tb.tb_lineno was not always correct); kept for compatibility.
